name: Audio Stack Completion
description: Full local audio generation — TTS voices, music, SFX — integrated into content + UGC pipeline
gate: Generate sample voice, music track, and SFX locally. Chatterbox voice cloning tested.

userStories.title: Install AudioCraft for music + SFX generation
userStories.description: As a content creator, I need AudioCraft installed and working for local music and sound effect generation.
acceptanceCriteria: AudioCraft installed in comfy-venv or dedicated venv
Import audiocraft succeeds without errors
MusicGen small model downloads and loads
AudioGen model downloads and loads
GPU acceleration works (AMD ROCm)
Generate 5-second test music clip successfully
userStories.notes: pip install audiocraft. May need audiocraft[audioools] extras. Test ROCm compatibility first.

userStories.title: Test AudioCraft on AMD ROCm — verify GPU inference works
userStories.description: As a technical operator, I need to verify AudioCraft runs on AMD ROCm GPU so I know if local audio gen is viable.
acceptanceCriteria: AudioCraft uses GPU for inference (verify via rocm-smi)
Music generation completes in under 30 seconds for 10-second clip
No CUDA-specific errors (AudioCraft may assume CUDA)
If ROCm fails: document error and test CPU fallback performance
Write compatibility report to ralph/phase2-audiocraft-rocm.md
userStories.notes: AudioCraft may need patches for ROCm. PyTorch in comfy-venv is ROCm-native (2.10.0.dev+rocm6.3).

userStories.title: Test Chatterbox V3 voice generation with emotion profiles
userStories.description: As a content creator, I need to verify all 10 emotion profiles in Chatterbox V3 work for natural-sounding voiceovers.
acceptanceCriteria: All 10 emotion profiles generate audio successfully
Each profile produces noticeably different vocal tone/emotion
Generated audio is clear and natural-sounding (no artifacts)
Generation time under 10 seconds per 100 words
Save sample outputs to ~/test-output/chatterbox-samples/
userStories.notes: Chatterbox V3 already installed (pip, v0.1.7). 10 emotion profiles exist in the UGC pipeline scripts.

userStories.title: Test Chatterbox V3 voice cloning with reference audio
userStories.description: As a content creator, I need voice cloning to work so I can create consistent branded voices across all content.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide a reference audio file (10-30 seconds) for cloning
Generate new speech in the cloned voice
Cloned voice maintains speaker characteristics from reference
Generate both English and Spanish text with same cloned voice
Save sample outputs to ~/test-output/chatterbox-clone-samples/
userStories.notes: voice_references/ directory exists in ugc-videos project. Need actual reference audio files from Mr. Z.

userStories.title: Create Hermes skill for local audio generation (TTS + music + SFX)
userStories.description: As an operator, I need a reusable Hermes skill for local audio generation so any agent can generate voices, music, and SFX.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill covers: Chatterbox TTS, AudioCraft MusicGen, AudioCraft AudioGen
Includes prompt templates for: narration, podcast intro, background music, SFX
Documents GPU requirements and fallback options
Skill tested: generate voice + music + SFX via Hermes agent call
Troubleshooting section for AMD ROCm audio issues
userStories.notes: Create at skills/creative/audio-generation/ or extend existing audiocraft skill.

userStories.title: Integrate audio gen into UGC video pipeline
userStories.description: As the video pipeline operator, I need the UGC pipeline to use local Chatterbox TTS instead of cloud TTS for voiceovers.
acceptanceCriteria: UGC pipeline generate_video.py uses Chatterbox V3 by default
Emotion profile assignment per scene works correctly
Voice cloning integration for consistent narrator voice
Background music generated locally via AudioCraft (optional flag)
Pipeline still produces complete output: audio files + timeline manifest
userStories.notes: Pipeline at ~/ugc-videos/scripts/generate_video.py. Already has Chatterbox integration, needs testing.

userStories.title: Create audio style presets (brand voice, music mood templates)
userStories.description: As a brand operator, I need consistent audio branding across all content so listeners recognize the Pepewebtech sound.
acceptanceCriteria: Define 3 voice presets: professional-narrator, friendly-explainer, energetic-promo
Define 5 music mood presets: upbeat-tech, calm-focus, dramatic-reveal, corporate-modern, lofi-chill
Define 10 SFX presets: transition-whoosh, notification-ding, success-chime, error-buzz, typing-click, etc.
Each preset saved as reusable config
Test each preset: generate sample output
userStories.notes: These presets feed into blog pipeline (podcast intros), UGC pipeline (video narration), and social media.

userStories.title: Fallback chain: local → Edge TTS → cloud if GPU fails
userStories.description: As a reliability operator, I need automatic fallback so content generation never blocks on GPU issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Audio generation tries local GPU first (Chatterbox/AudioCraft)
If local fails: falls back to Edge TTS (free, cloud, no GPU)
If Edge TTS fails: falls back to ZAI cloud TTS
Fallback chain logged with reason for fallback
No content generation blocked for more than 60 seconds
userStories.notes: Edge TTS is already default TTS. ZAI cloud TTS is available as last resort.
